tools.name: company.deleteCompanyAttendancesId
tools.description: This endpoint is responsible for deleting attendance data for the company employees.

tools.name: company.deleteCompanyTimeOffsId
tools.description: This endpoint is responsible for deleting absence period data for the company employees.

tools.name: company.getCompanyAttendances
tools.description: This endpoint is responsible for fetching attendance data for the company employees. It is possible to paginate results, filter by period, the date and/or time it was updated, and/or specific employees. The result will contain a list of attendance periods, structured as defined here.

tools.name: company.getCompanyTimeOffs
tools.description: This endpoint is responsible for fetching absence data for the company employees. It is possible to paginate results, filter by period and/or specific employees. The result will contain a list of absence periods, structured as defined here.

tools.name: company.getCompanyTimeOffTypes
tools.description: Provides a list of available time-off types, for example 'Paid vacation', 'Parental leave' or 'Home office'

tools.name: company.patchCompanyAttendancesId
tools.description: This endpoint is responsible for updating attendance data for the company employees. Attributes are not required and if not specified, the current value will be used. It is not possible to change the employee id.

tools.name: company.postCompanyAttendances
tools.description: This endpoint is responsible for adding attendance data for the company employees. It is possible to add attendances for one or many employees at the same time. The payload sent on the request should be a list of attendance periods, in the form of an array containing attendance period objects.

tools.name: company.postCompanyEmployees
tools.description: Creates new employee. Status of the employee will be set to `active` if `hire_date` provided is in past. Otherwise status will be set to `onboarding`. This endpoint will respond with `id` of created employee in case of success.

tools.name: company.postCompanyTimeOffs
tools.description: This endpoint is responsible for adding absence data for the company employees.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
